name: Cherry Cookie Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Prepare a 12-inch pizza pan with cooking spray and flour; set aside.
3. To prepare crust, combine margarine, egg whites, milk, and vanilla in a mixing bowl.
4. In another mixing bowl, combine flour, granulated sugar, and baking powder.
5. Mix wet ingredients with dry ingredients just until moistened.
6. On a lightly floured surface, roll dough into a 12-inch circle.
7. Press into prepared pizza pan.
8. Bake for 7 minutes or until golden brown. Cool.
9. Meanwhile, to prepare topping, combine powdered sugar and cream cheese.
10. Spread over cooled cookie crust to within 1/2 inch of the edge.
11. Spoon cherry pie filling over cream cheese layer.
